mapper.select: SELECT "users"."id" AS "id", "users"."name" AS "name", "users"."email" AS "email", "users"."created_at" AS "created_at" FROM "users" AS "users" ORDER BY "users"."id"
SELECT "u"."id" AS "id", "u"."name" AS "name", "u"."email" AS "email", "u"."created_at" AS "created_at" FROM "users" AS "u" WHERE "u"."id" = #{id}

SELECT "a"."id" AS "id", "a"."name" AS "name", "a"."email" AS "email", "a"."created_at" AS "created_at", "b"."id" AS "id", "b"."name" AS "name", "b"."email" AS "email", "b"."created_at" AS "created_at" FROM "users" AS "a" JOIN "users" AS "b" ON "a"."id" <> "b"."id" WHERE "a"."id" = #{id}

WITH "recent" AS ( SELECT "users"."id" AS "id", "users"."name" AS "name", "users"."email" AS "email", "users"."created_at" AS "created_at" FROM "users" AS "users" WHERE "users"."created_at" > #{since} ) SELECT "recent"."id" AS "id", "recent"."name" AS "name", "recent"."email" AS "email", "recent"."created_at" AS "created_at" FROM "recent" AS "recent" ORDER BY "recent"."id"
